Project Overview

A landmark lobby
for Creek Harbour's
finest residences

The Cove at Dubai Creek Harbour is one of the most prestigious residential developments in Dubai's newest waterfront district. Spaceó Interiors was commissioned to design and fit out the lobby and common areas across all three towers — The Cove 1, 2, and 3.

The brief called for a space that felt both welcoming and aspirational — a grand arrival experience worthy of the waterfront views and the calibre of resident. Every material, fixture, and piece of furniture was carefully sourced and specified by our team.

From the signature marble reception desks and dramatic pendant lighting installations to the sculptural lounge seating and curated greenery, every detail was designed to create a sense of arrival that residents feel every time they come home.

Scope of Work

What we delivered
across three towers

Lobby Design

Full interior design of ground floor lobbies across The Cove 1, 2, and 3 — each with its own distinctive reception focal point.

FF&E Procurement

Full furniture, fixtures, and equipment specification and procurement — from sculptural lounge chairs to statement lighting pendants.

Landscaping & Greenery

Indoor landscaping design including the selection and placement of feature trees and curated planters throughout all common areas.

Material Specification

Marble flooring, reception desk cladding, ceiling treatments and wall finishes — every material selected and supervised on-site.

Lighting Design

Dramatic pendant lighting installations as feature elements, balanced with ambient and accent lighting throughout.

Project Management

Full on-site project management from commencement through to final handover — coordinating all trades and suppliers.
